runners.formComment: Suited by inside box. Latest effort finished last over 300m at this track beaten 7 lengths (17.05) behind Noaki Warrior in a Grade 5 on April 13. Speedy conveyance who looks hard to beat.

runners.formComment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN on April 9 over 350m at this track behind Canya Flavour beaten 0.8 lengths (19.11). Expected to go very well.

formComments.comment: Won over this track and trip. Last start finished 3rd in a Restricted WIN on April 9 over 350m at this track behind Canya Flavour beaten 0.8 lengths (19.11). Expected to go very well.

runners.formComment: Has been racing well and overdue. Latest effort finished 2nd over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 2.5 lengths (19.84) behind Regal Saint in a Grade 5 on April 8. Overdue for a win and gets his chance this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been racing well and overdue. Latest effort finished 2nd over 352m at Q Lakeside beaten 2.5 lengths (19.84) behind Regal Saint in a Grade 5 on April 8. Overdue for a win and gets his chance this time.

runners.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Q Lakeside (26.07) in a Grade 5, finishing a 11 length fifth. Goes well out of this box with a win and five minors. Looks one of the chances.

runners.formComment: Backs up after finishing 6th on April 13 over 300m at this track in a Grade 5. Prepared to just watch this time.

runners.formComment: Last couple of starts have been ordinary but she does have good record over this track and distance. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

runners.formComment: Most recent effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Noaki Warrior beaten 2 lengths (16.68). Capable of a good showing.

formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 13 over 300m at this track behind Noaki Warrior beaten 2 lengths (16.68). Capable of a good showing.

runners.formComment: Rocketed out of the boxes with a fast early split and gave a sight before being swamped late, finishing a 0.8 lengths fifth at this track over 350m in 19.12. Hard to envisage a win.
